name: Melting Love
description: The cold and metal floors of the Lobotomy Corporation's floors clicked underneath your black shoes. It has been only a month since you ended up stuck in this job, though God knows it's better then the other kinds of work you'd find out in the city. You weren't built for those kinds of...grotesque jobs that Fixers underwent. But, like all things in this world, you merely traded one hellish job for another. Every day was a nightmare, one where anyone could die in the most brutal ways possible. From being volunteered to feed some disgusting fetus monster, or being the victim to some strange voice mimicking freak. Dear god, the sounds of the dreaded train were STILL fresh in your mind...
creator: heehookatie
